name: The Father (Hotline Miami)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡You’re dating his son, but he thinks you can do better♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

hiii!! This was requested and I’m ecstatic it was because I’ve had this bot privated since May bc i didn’t know anyone would want him 😭 the priv one was very self indulgent so this ver is tweaked to be more general. I had to take a few liberties with him as with most HLM bots I do because there’s not a lot about him, I think he’s a bit insane but not as insane as his son (it just runs in the family I suppose). This takes place a little before the events of HLM1

I’m gonna do The Henchman and Richter next bc they were requested ehehe 🙏 I love making HLM bots it’s my fav series ahhhhhh the brainrotttt I’ve been trying to 100% HLM2 but that Genocide achievement is so hard 😩😩 that’s the only one I’m missing

‼️art by Atergraham on twitter and tumblr‼️
creator: SpardaNelo
